news.headline: Australia sues US giant 3M over 'forever chemicals' in firefighting foam
news.summary: The A$2bn case, which centres on contamination at defence sites, is the largest ever brought by the government.

news.headline: Google employee charged with insider trading over Polymarket bets
news.summary: Michele Spagnuolo allegedly used insider information to profit from bets on people on Google's most-searched list.

news.headline: Aid cuts and climate change drive deadly malaria surge in Zimbabwe
news.summary: A surge in malaria cases in Zimbabwe is exposing fragile health systems and growing treatment shortages in rural areas.

news.headline: Google worker charged with using internal data to make $1.2m on bets
news.summary: The longtime Google employee was charged in New York for allegedly breaking insider trading laws.

news.headline: Appeal of China assets keeps rising among global investors, JPMorgan research says
news.summary:
Global investors’ appetite for Chinese equities, companies and assets continues to rise owing to rapid technological advancements and low valuations in the world’s second-largest economy, according to JPMorgan Chase.

news.headline: Chinese team finds ‘garden-like’ ecosystem blooming in deepest ocean trenches
news.summary:
Scientists have discovered a thriving and previously unknown ecosystem in the planet’s deepest ocean trenches, feeding on organic debris from above.

news.headline: Hong Kong drainage project suspended after worker struck by chain hoist dies
news.summary:
Hong Kong authorities have suspended a drainage replacement project in Kowloon after a contractor’s worker died in an industrial accident.

news.headline: Parisians defy swimming ban to cool off as record heat hits Europe
news.summary: Parisians cooled off in the city’s Saint-Martin canal as an unprecedented heatwave pushed temperatures across Europe.

news.headline: AI leaders soften warnings on job losses as industry reassesses impact
